notes: Guyana should score English as the official national language while recognizing that Creolese and Indigenous languages matter in daily life. Guyanese Creole English should also count as a minor exact local match because it exists in the picker catalog.

evidence.title: Guyana Tourism FAQ
evidence.note: Official tourism guidance says English is Guyana's official first language and notes that Creolese and several Indigenous dialects are also spoken.

evidence.title: Guyana Tourism multilingual site
evidence.note: Guyana's tourism authority serves international visitors through a multilingual planning platform while treating English as the primary working language.

notes: Namibia should score English as the official language while acknowledging that many people use other local and regional languages in daily life. For country-level travel compatibility, English remains the cleanest default.

evidence.title: Government of Namibia: About Namibia
evidence.note: The Government of Namibia lists English as the official language.

evidence.title: Constitution of the Republic of Namibia
evidence.note: Article 3 of the Namibian Constitution states that the official language of Namibia is English.
